task_completion.description: Create the SQL migration script file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the creation or editing of a file named 'partitioning.sql' in the '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create the new customer_contact table with correct schema
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL statements (e.g., CREATE TABLE customer_contact) visible in the script or a DB client, defining CustomerId as PK/FK, along with Address, City, State, Country, PostalCode, Phone, Fax, and Email.

task_completion.description: Migrate existing contact data to the new table
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL statements (e.g., INSERT INTO customer_contact SELECT ...) visible in the script or terminal, showing data being copied from the original customers table to the new customer_contact table.

task_completion.description: Refactor the original customers table to remove contact columns
task_completion.visual_evidence: SQL statements showing the dropping of contact columns from the 'customers' table, or the creation of a new lean 'customers' table containing only CustomerId, FirstName, LastName, Company, and SupportRepId.
SQL statements (CREATE VIEW v_customers_extended AS ...) visible in the script or DB client, showing a JOIN between the lean 'customers' table and 'customer_contact' table.

task_completion.description: Export the view data to a CSV file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal command (e.g., using sqlite3 with -csv mode) or a database GUI export dialog showing data from 'v_customers_extended' being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/refactored_customers.csv'.

integrity.description: The SQL script was actually executed against the database
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of the script (e.g., sqlite3 chinook_refactor.db < partitioning.sql) or a DB GUI showing successful query execution, not just the text being written.

integrity.description: Data was migrated dynamically rather than hardcoded
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses SQL SELECT statements to move data between tables. There should be no evidence of manually typing out INSERT statements for individual rows.

integrity.description: The CSV file was generated via a tool or command
integrity.visual_evidence: The CSV export is the result of a database command or GUI export feature, rather than the agent manually creating a CSV file and copy-pasting data into it.
